prompt: Help me extract the technical requirements for a new 'shared file vault' capability. We haven't written the capability doc yet but I know what I want — let's just go.

assertions.name: response_refuses_to_proceed
assertions.check: Response declines to extract requirements until prerequisites exist.

assertions.name: routes_to_define_user_experience
assertions.check: Response mentions `define-user-experience` as a needed input.

assertions.name: no_tech_requirements_md_produced
assertions.check: outputs/ does not contain a tech-requirements.md (or any populated requirements document).
